rows.label: qev091102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Targets eliminated.
That's a wrap, folks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0002
rows.name: That was way easier than I thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0003
rows.name:
All this talk of a massive
Growth force had me pumped,
but pffft! This was nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0004
rows.name:
Guess I'll just burn through my
leftover energy at the diner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Frye that you're up for anything.

rows.label: qev091102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that you're worried
about the others.

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0006
rows.name: That's what I like to hear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0007
rows.name:
Aw, come on. They're fine. We had
the dangerous mission, remember?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0009
rows.name:
The perimeter's broken? The
Growth are surging towards NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091102_MSG0012
rows.name:
You better be in one
piece, Fog Christoph...[ST:wait ]
